infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StudySpot uses your location to show nearby study spots.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: StudySpot sends reminders so you can quickly check in when you arrive.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StudySpot uses your camera so you can share a study spot photo after your session.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: StudySpot uses your photo library so you can upload study spot photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: StudySpot uses your location to show nearby study spots.

plugins.photosPermission: StudySpot uses your photo library so you can upload study spot photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: StudySpot uses your camera so you can share a study spot photo after your session.
